# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def create
    image = params[:image].tempfile
    command = "convert #{image.path} -resize x#{params[:size]}! #{params[:format]} #{Rails.root}/public/processed_images/output.#{params[:format]}"
    system(command)
    redirect_to action: 'show', id: "processed_images/output.#{params[:format]}"
  end

  def show
    send_file Rails.root + "public/processed_images/output.#{params[:format]}", type: params[:format], disposition: :inline
  end
end
